subComponentsNote: No dedicated sub-components. The picker is a self-contained composite of scroll columns.

anatomy.description: Outer surface. 375px wide, 212px tall. Background: --surface/neutral/default. No border, no border-radius.
Horizontal stripe centered vertically, spanning the full width. 31px tall. Marks the active selection row. Rendered as an image asset in Figma.
Flex row containing all four columns. Centered horizontally and vertically. Gap between columns: 27px. Uses Manrope Regular.
Rightmost-left column. Displays abbreviated date labels (e.g., 'Sat Feb 12', 'Today'). Right-aligned text. 7 visible items.
Second column. Displays hours (1–12). Center-aligned text. 7 visible items.
Third column. Displays minutes (00–59). Center-aligned text. 7 visible items.
Fourth column. Displays AM and PM only. Center-aligned. Only 2 of 7 slots are populated; others are opacity-0. Controlled by amOrPm variant.

variants.name: AM selected
variants.description: AM is centered (selected). PM is visible one position below at 18px.

variants.name: PM selected
variants.description: PM is centered (selected). AM is visible one position above at 18px.

scrollDepthSystem.description: Each column shows 7 items. The selected item is always at position 4 (center). Size and opacity decrease progressively toward the edges.

date.format: Abbreviated day + month + date number (e.g., 'Sat Feb 12'). 'Today' for the current date.

hour.note: TODO: Confirm whether hours loop infinitely.

minute.note: TODO: Confirm minute step increment (1-min vs 5-min vs 15-min steps).

amPm.note: Only 2 of 7 slots are visible. All others use opacity-0.

usageContext: Used in the Dojo Customer App on the 'Choose a time' screen.
Placed below a Segmented Control switching between 'Pickup at' and 'Drop-off by' modes.
A time summary text (selected time + estimated travel time) is displayed below the picker.
A primary 'Next' action button appears below the summary.
notes: The selection indicator is an image asset in Figma — implementation should use a CSS equivalent (e.g., top/bottom borders or a background overlay).
The AM/PM column uses opacity-0 for all unused slots to maintain consistent column height.
Figma prop naming ('Yes' / 'AM or PM2') is non-semantic — replace with 'AM' / 'PM' in implementation.

TODO: Confirm 24-hour clock variant (without AM/PM column).
